pageContext.name: Galactus: The Devourer
pageContext.description: I know not who or what they are below! I only know Galactus must feed!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Galactus: The Devourer Fine Art Print, an explosive new Marvel art print by artist Doaly.  It's a colorful cosmic calamity in the mighty Marvel manner! Artist Doaly renders a vibrant take on the ceaseless hunger that is Galactus, the Devourer of Worlds. The Silver Surfer has summoned his master to a grouping of worlds to fuel his never-ending needs, as the planet in the center is broken apart in a shower of blinding brightness. Even the boundaries of the image border cannot contain Galactus' unstoppable energy, as the Power Cosmic radiates outward to form a full bleed giclée design that is bursting with detail and destruction.  Each Galactus: The Devourer Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Pair this Galactus wall art with the Galactus Maquette or Silver Surfer Maquette by Sideshow, each sold separately, for a Marvel Comics display packed with crackling cosmic power.  As his herald, direct him to a new world! Consume your collection with the presence of the Galactus: The Devourer Fine Art Print by Doaly today.
